title: ProDec Rosewood Clipt Putty Knife for Mixing and Applying and Smoothing Fillers, Sealants and Putty
features: Trade quality 1.5" (38mm) knife for mixing, applying and smoothing fillers, sealants and putty in cracks, holes and around window frames
Clipt profile with straight and rounded edges for smoothing and shaping materials
Stainless steel semi-rigid blade with full tang through the handle to prevent breakage
Premium quality varnished rosewood handle with hanging hole for easy storage
Not designed for heavy duty stripping of paint, adhesive, wallpaper, etc.
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Putty knife - a classic decorator's tool This trade quality putty knife features a rust-resistant stainless steel blade that has a clipt shape where two edges - one straight cut and the other rounded - meet at a point, which is the ideal profile for a wide range of surfaces and situations where materials like putty and sealants need to be moulded to a smooth shape. As well as general filling tasks, its shape makes it particularly ideal for reglazing windows and smoothing sealants at edges and corners for a smooth, seamless finish. The blade is more rigid than straight edge filling knives and has a full tang, meaning it extends all the way through the handle and prevents it snapping at the join of handle and blade, giving it a much longer lifetime than half tang and DIY scrapers. It is mounted onto a premium quality varnished handle made from durable rosewood, which is ergonomically shaped to fit neatly into the palm of your hand and reduce hand fatigue especially during extended use, with a hanging hole for easy storage. Solutions for applying fillers and sealants from ProDec Fillers, sealants and caulk are essential to getting your surface perfectly smooth ready for painting or papering. Whether you're applying or smoothing, filling deep holes, hairline cracks, long joins between plasterboard panels and more, ProDec has a range of tools to help you get your surface in tiptop condition. Rosewood filling knives A flexible stainless steel blade with full tang that extends all the way through the handle and prevents it snapping at the join of handle and blade, giving it a much longer lifetime than half tang and DIY scrapers. Mounted onto a premium quality varnished handle made from durable rosewood. Available in 1", 2", 3" and 4" sizes. Duragrip filling knives A flexible stainless steel blade with full tang mounted onto ProDec's premium quality Duragrip soft grip handle that is ergonomically shaped for reduced hand fatigue. It also has a solid steel hammer end which is useful for quickly and efficiently hammering nails, tacks, wall plugs, etc. Available in 1.25", 2", 3" and 4" sizes. Filling blades A deep, thin and flexible steel blade mounted onto a short, full width plastic handle which gives close control with general purpose and fine surface fillers on walls, ceilings and woodwork. Available in a pack of 4 mixed sizes containing 2", 3", 4" and 5" widths. Caulkers With a flexible plastic blade that has a wider profile than standard filling knives, caulkers enable you to fill gaps of many shapes and sizes quickly and efficiently. They are particularly useful where long joins require sealing, such as marrying plasterboards together. Available in 8", 10" and 12" sizes. Taping knives A high carbon steel blade, heat treated for strength. It has a laser-straight edge that makes it ideal for smoothing plasterboard jointing tape down to give the lowest possible profile for a seamless appearance when plastered, as well as filling seams and holes for an ultra-smooth, professional finish. Available in 6", 8", 10" and 12" sizes. Skeleton caulking guns Trade quality guns for applying cartridge-based sealants, caulk and fillers, featuring a powerful trigger, robust plunger and a release clip to give a clean break in the sealant bead, ensuring no long, messy strings. Available in standard format plus a reinforced model that is especially ideal for higher viscosity sealants. Revolving caulking gun Refines the classic skeleton design to the next level, for trade quality, ultra-smooth application of cartridge-based sealants, caulk and fillers. The reinforced barrel not only gives heavy duty performance, it can be rotated during application to give a continuous smooth bead around corners and in awkward areas. Foil sausage guns Robust, full metal barrel construction ensuring no mess when used with foil-based sealants, caulk and fillers and also compatible with traditional cartridges. Features powerful plunger and powdered coated trigger with quick release clip for precise control to stop the flow when required. Available in 400ml and 600ml versions.
